name: Font Access – Annual Company Plan
classification_notes: The page does not describe a single typeface but a font subscription plan; the foundry's catalogue leans geometric and rounded sans-serif based on featured products such as Bauhaus Bau, Apex and Anky.
summary: A company-wide annual font subscription from Mojomox granting access to up to three active font families for desktop, web, logos and apps.
description: Rather than a single typeface, this is a licensing plan covering Mojomox's catalogue of geometric and rounded sans-serif fonts. Up to three font families can be active at any one time, with the ability to swap them as needed. The plan covers unlimited desktop, web, logo and app use with unlimited page views, scaled by team size from five up to five thousand users.
foundry_blurb: Mojomox's annual company plan provides access to up to three live font families, switchable at any time, with a single subscription covering desktop, web, logos and apps with unlimited page views. User tiers run from five to five thousand, and app use is included except for design or typing applications.

name: Add-on: Font Customization
classification_notes: This is not a typeface but a font customisation add-on service offered by Mojomox, allowing letter swaps within purchased fonts. No specific category applies; display is used as a placeholder given the foundry's product range.
summary: A paid add-on service from Mojomox that lets buyers swap individual glyphs in a purchased font with alternatives from the Mojomox logo maker or their own vector artwork.
description: Rather than a typeface in its own right, this is a customisation service layered on top of any Mojomox font purchase. Buyers specify which letters to replace, at a tiered price depending on the number of swaps, and Mojomox manually builds and delivers the modified font files within one to three business days. Accent variants of swapped letters are included at no extra cost, and the original glyphs are retained as a stylistic set.
foundry_blurb: Mojomox offer this add-on for buyers who want to personalise a font with alternative glyphs drawn from the Mojomox logo maker app, the font's own stylistic sets, or the customer's own AI vector files. Pricing scales from one letter up to ten, covers all weights of the purchased family at no additional cost, and the modified font is delivered by email within one to three business days.
